final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single large knowledge card for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms era.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large card layout with a clear title at the top, key bullet points listed and numbered on the side, and a cartoon story scene as the main visual body
Subject: must include the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) as the core topic, with child-friendly cartoon characters representing the Three Kingdoms figures
Scene/backdrop: must depict the Red Cliffs battle scene — river, fire ships, armies — rendered in cartoon story illustration style
Lighting/mood: needs a vivid, energetic atmosphere suitable for children — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, cheerful direction appropriate for a children's educational card — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include the title "赤壁之战" prominently at the top; must include numbered key-point annotations listed alongside the illustration
Constraints: must preserve single-card format; title, bullet-point annotations, and cartoon story illustration must all be visible in one composition; content must be age-appropriate and easy to understand for children
Avoid: must avoid dark, violent, or frightening imagery; must avoid dense adult-style text blocks
